feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The New Son of Krypton
entry.summary:
Author: Sally_Boomer

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,011Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 140

Summary: Superman whipped the condensation on the healing-vessel window with a shaky hand, the oppression on his chest only growing more overwhelming the more he cleared the view. Then he saw it. There, floating in the fluid, was a foetus. “Kelex.” Kal’s voice came broken and strangled, and a little hysterical, “Kelex, what is inside?” “A Kryptonian-human, Kal-El.” Replied the AI, “A descendant designed to better adapt to the planet chosen to board the House of El. A new type of Kryptonian for a new planet.” “A hybrid for…” Started Kal, only to stop mid-sentence, suddenly assaulted by a dreadful realisation. “Which human? Whose DNA did you take for this? From whom did you take the human sample?” “Your chosen mate, Kal-El. Batman.” Kelex answered without pause, as if the answer was obvious. ---- Superman, who has been secretly in love with his best friend for over a decade, accidentally baby traps Batman with a human-kryptonian child. Or Clark Kent and Bruce Wayne are Conner Wayne's biological parents, and they may or may not fall in love while raising their child together.

entry.title: I'll believe in Anything (Superbat)
entry.summary:
Author: elzabethtay

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,453Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 0

Summary: I can't believe I haven't written Superbat once on this account, anyways, yes there is smut but it's a lovey-dovey sorta fic, also, you can imagine Bruce and Clark to be any of their portrayals or hell even any sort of fancast that you like that aren't specified in the tags, ENJOY! again I'm being serious here, English is genuinely my second language.

entry.title: Bite the Hand that Feeds
entry.summary:
Author: Gotham_Blight

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,144Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 26

Summary: Kal-El has one simple rule: Don't get hurt If Bruce won't follow that rule, he might be forced to take more extreme measures. He'd be willing to do anything to keep the stubborn man safe, after all. Bruce is his; first and foremost. Only his.

entry.title: Black feathers of the night
entry.summary:
Author: Jesse29705

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,049Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: batman is missing as everyone is worried about it. all of the League of Justice know that he can take care of himself, but being gone for 1 week, something is very wrong, and Superman knows it. The bat family have been looking for him but with no luck as the only one that had seen batman was Superman himself, but that was one week ago. weeks passed, and nothing ever came, making Superman feel depressed and decided to fly back to his apartment to ease of his mind. while flying home, he felt a very weak, heartbeat, nearby as he decided to check it out only to encounter a injured Black Swan. (Meanwhile in the Multiverse] an evil sorcerer was teleporting in different dimensions looking for someone before arriving Batman's universe and caught a sight of his prize as his master plan will begin to take the throne And no one will get his way.

entry.title: A Song of Prayer (That Finds No Melody)
entry.summary:
Author: batsbysupers

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,417Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 12

Summary: Carefully, He glued ravens’ feathers on its head with candle wax and poured the blue sea’s waters where the eyes should be. He tugged at the delicate wood to shape its lean limbs, then cut them open and filled them with cotton batting before sewing them close again with weeds threaded on golden needles. For its torso, He bent a silver thimble into slopes and edges that could hold a red marble at the center. He blew cold gusts into its rifts to clean them from dust and spilled boiling water into them to keep the warmth. He poured patience on its head and let it settle. He pressed love onto its chest and let it linger. Or: an AU of Batman: The Knight (2023) in which Clark is Bruce’s guardian angel.

entry.title: Coming Home to You
entry.summary:
Author: RandomFan001

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,173Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 153

Summary: Clark had long given up his dream of finding his soulmate. The weird feeling he had when his eyes met Batman’s wasn’t anything but nerves and attraction. Definitely not. But when his instincts start acting up, he starts to suspect it’s something else. Worst of all, so does Batman. Featuring; healthy co-parenting, a healthy amount of pining, and a story about finding love and family

entry.title: Under the Cover of Fire
entry.summary:
Author: Your_guilty_pleasure

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,799Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 117

Summary: Clark Kent, while slightly more powerful than the average human, gets himself into trouble constantly. Much to his cousin Kara's annoyance, he's a nosy journalist that's great at his job. A little too good from the looks of a certain vigilante.When Clark gets a little too nosey in the wrong part of Gotham he ends up roped into a messy undercover mission with one Matches Malone. Drugs, sex, and mafia men threaten all around. Can Clark play arm candy well enough? Can Bruce keep him safe?

entry.title: This Darling Pup of Ours
entry.summary:
Author: Azrael_S_M

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,419Chapters: 3/6Kudos: 124

Summary: It started at 3 in the morning, as all good things do. He had officially hit his seventh month of this pregnancy and was looking forward to its end. He was eager to meet his pup, the little bundle of life growing within him seemingly eager as well, if the kicking was anything to go by. But something was wrong, something felt wrong. It sat like lead on his tongue, heavy and metallic, and oh-so-frightfully unfamiliar.

entry.summary:
Author: McPasstel

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,045Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 63

Summary: Clark has been helping the Justice League for many years now - as he approaches middle age, he thinks it’s time they bring some new heroes into the fold. entry.title: Family maybe?
entry.summary:
Author: E_fox_lady53799armor

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,741Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 52

Summary: Summary : After a long time searching about his biological family Jason Todd finds out that he has a cousin. And as if that weren’t enough he is supposed to be the kid that now got adopted by a Bruce.But something doesn’t add up. His scars. His movements, like he had to fight his entire life. And worst of all his eyes. They look like they have seen centuries but also like a calm water but too calm .———Percy Jackson two wars veteran trying to live his life after his mother’s death. But one day he meets a man that looks a lot like him but older and less divine (like Poseidon), but if he took those things aside… no that man can’t be..but..no..his father Poseidon had warned him that he might meet him, but he never thought it was possible… too much similarities!!!

entry.title: Conflict of Interest
entry.summary:
Author: BlackLynx

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,543Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 28

Summary: A reimagined first meeting between Clark Kent and Bruce Wayne during their early days as Superman and Batman. Following Clark's perspective, this story follows Clark and Bruce's search for companionship as they develop their identities as Batman and Superman, struggling to find balance and let each other in. It is funny, angsty, smutty, hopeful, and features a happy ending. The first chapter features Lois Lane and Clark being best friends, Bruce being a bit cocky and forward, Zatanna as Bruce's beard, a dazzling Gala, some heroics, and a quickly resolved misunderstanding.

entry.title: 𝑻𝑯𝑬 𝑷𝑬𝑹𝑭𝑼𝑴𝑬 // 𝑺𝑼𝑷𝑬𝑹𝑩𝑨𝑻 𝑶𝑵𝑬-𝑺𝑯𝑶𝑻
entry.summary:
Author: battinscnz

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,999Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 28

Summary: On a rain-soaked evening in Metropolis, Clark Kent arrives at their shared apartment with Bruce carrying the chill of the storm with him. But it isn’t the weather that unsettles him - it’s the new perfume Bruce is wearing, something impossible to ignore. One breath turns into something deeper, and soon the quiet warmth of Bruce’s study becomes the center of a slow, consuming unraveling neither of them intends to stop.

entry.title: Blue Bird's Wings
entry.summary:
Author: InfinityBlaze

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,426Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Dick Grayson was on the trail of something hot, and he knew it. A fringe cult that had started up recently and had made moves into Gotham, using force to take space in the abandoned corners of the city, reportedly using some kind of magic to do so. Alongside this there seemed to be an opposing cult that was trying to destroy this other faction. Dick wanted to be on top of this new threat to the city, and whilst on the cusp of a breakthrough was captured by the secondary cult on suspicions of him being a “Witch”. This catches the dark eyes of a being just starting to gain back his power.

entry.title: Aphelion
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,843Chapters: 4/13Kudos: 11

Summary: The thing about Lex Luthor's parties is that they are an exercise in applied pressure. Bruce Wayne arrives at a Metropolis gala with a device in his pocket and an exit strategy in his head. He leaves with neither, and a persistent frequency he cannot locate or turn off. Clark Kent is warm, direct, and completely unimpressed by power. He takes Amtrak. He tips well. He eats fermented shark with the serenity of a man at peace with the universe. Bruce builds a file. The threat assessment field remains blank. This is a problem. — A BvS divergence. Close third Bruce POV. Physics metaphors and slow burn throughout. Explicit in the back half.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
